arts.ttl: Man United vs. Athletic Bilbao: Starting XIs confirmed for Europa League blockbuster at Old Trafford
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim confirms his starting side for Thursday's Europa League semi-final second leg against Athletic Bilbao.

arts.ttl: Why Nico and Inaki Williams Aren't Playing for Athletic Bilbao vs. Man Utd
arts.sum: Nico and Iñaki Williams both are sidelined for Athletic Bilbao's Europa League match against Manchester United due to injury.

arts.ttl: Man United vs Athletic Bilbao LIVE: Europa League final beckons for hosts after huge win
arts.sum: Manchester United took a huge step towards the Bilbao final with a 3-0 win last week
